characteristics.coat_type: Medium to long, water-resistant double coat

description.overview: The Leonberger was bred to resemble a lion and serve as a versatile working dog and family companion.
description.temperament: Leos are gentle giants - friendly, patient, and wonderful with children. They love water.
description.health: Prone to hip dysplasia, bloat, and some heart conditions. Shorter lifespan.
description.exercise: Moderate exercise needs. Love swimming and family activities.

best_for: Those with space for a giant breed
verdict.summary: Majestic, lion-like gentle giants. Leonbergers are patient, friendly family dogs but need space and have shorter lifespans.
